creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey Daniel, thank you for the patches. I was not aware of this PR when I committed the other set of updates for fprintd.

I see that Li-Wen is now working on your patches so perhaps he'll find some bits which improve the fprintd ports even further.

Again, I'm really sorry for not spotting your contribution earlier. The patches you submitted look solid and testing you conducted is highly appreciated :)
